ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "time_awst" TEXT /* Time of the weather observation in Australian Western Standard Time (AWST) */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like_c" REAL /* Feels-like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity_percent" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_gust_kmh" REAL /* Wind gust speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "pressure_hpa" REAL /* Pressure in hectopascals */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in millimeters */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of weather data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the data point (e.g., instrument used, calibration status) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecasted data */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Indicates if the data is valid or has been flagged for quality issues */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground, satellite, buoy) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name or contact information of the person responsible for the station */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather data point
Unique identifier for the weather station
Time of the weather observation in Australian Western Standard Time (AWST)
Wind speed in kilometers per hour
Wind gust speed in kilometers per hour
Type of weather data (e.g., temperature, humidity)
Metadata about the data point (e.g., instrument used, calibration status)
Indicates if the data is valid or has been flagged for quality issues
Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station)
Unique identifier for each weather station
Type of weather station (e.g., ground, satellite, buoy)
Date when the station was installed
Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance)
Name or contact information of the person responsible for the station
Additional notes or comments about the station
Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator)
Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive)
